retry_reason: Refcount decrement always succeeds; if it reaches zero, object is destroyed; retrying would lead to use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases a reference on a cls_fl_filter object via refcount_dec_and_test. If the refcount drops to zero, the filter is either destroyed immediately (if no net namespace) or via deferred work (if net namespace exists). After calling __fl_put, the caller must not access the filter object, as it may have been freed. This function is the standard release mechanism for a cls_fl_filter reference.
